overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the JINGUJI luxury boutique. The player moves through a sleek, futuristic interior with dark polished floors and neon accent lighting, passing by various NPCs, digital advertisements, and high-end displays. The environment transitions from a well-lit entrance area to darker back corridors of the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury boutique entrance with reception desk and vehicle display

events.description: camera passes closely by woman in white sweater standing near reception desk

agents.ego_description: walking into the JINGUJI boutique entrance, moving past the reception area and covered vehicle display

notable_agents.action: woman in white ribbed sweater standing near reception desk, then turning to walk away

entered.detail: black reception counter with illuminated white JINGUJI logo and Japanese text
luxury sports car under black fabric cover positioned in the entrance area
futuristic wavy ceiling design with recessed lighting and metallic finish
illuminated yellow linear lights embedded in the polished dark floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance of the JINGUJI luxury boutique, featuring a sleek reception desk with glowing signage on the right and a covered vehicle display in the center. The camera moves forward through a space with futuristic curved ceilings and neon floor lighting, passing by a woman in a white sweater near the reception area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main retail floor with digital advertising displays and storage area

events.description: passing by brightly lit digital advertisement screen showing fashion models on left wall

agents.ego_description: moving through the main retail area, passing by various shoppers and a worker near stacked boxes

notable_agents.action: worker in yellow safety vest and white hard hat standing near cardboard boxes

entered.detail: large illuminated vertical screen displaying fashion advertisements with human figures
wall with large JINGUJI logo and luxury product imagery
stacked cardboard delivery boxes near the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the boutique, the scene reveals a large digital advertisement screen on the left wall and a prominent JINGUJI brand display. The camera passes by a worker in a yellow vest near stacked boxes on the right, while the futuristic ceiling structure remains visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: boutique interior with golden art installation and customer browsing area

events.description: golden abstract sculpture temporarily blocks view while camera passes by on the right
camera navigates around customers standing near the center displays

agents.ego_description: navigating around a large golden sculpture and other customers browsing merchandise in the middle of the store

notable_agents.action: woman in dark clothing examining items on display near the golden sculpture

entered.detail: large reflective gold-colored organic-shaped art installation with curved forms
low black platforms showcasing merchandise and accessories

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a striking golden abstract sculpture that temporarily obscures the view, navigating through the central retail area with display pedestals. The JINGUJI brand wall remains visible in the background while shoppers browse nearby, and the lighting begins to dim as the space transitions toward the back of the store.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark back corridor with illuminated shoe display wall

events.description: entering significantly darker corridor with minimal overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: moving into the dimly lit back area of the boutique, approaching a backlit shoe display wall

notable_agents.action: person in orange shirt and white cap gesturing with arm raised near the shoe display

entered.detail: backlit wall with multiple shelves displaying various footwear arrangements
narrow dimly lit passage with dark walls leading to the back of the store

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dark, narrow corridor at the back of the boutique where overhead lighting is minimal. A backlit shoe display wall becomes the focal point ahead, while a person in an orange shirt stands nearby gesturing. The neon floor strips continue to provide subtle illumination along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a high-end luxury boutique that transitions from a bright, open entrance into a dim, narrow rear corridor. It begins at the reception area, gliding past a glowing desk and a covered vehicle display under futuristic curved ceilings and neon floor lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the store, the space opens up to reveal large digital advertisements and a worker near stacked boxes before passing a striking golden abstract sculpture that momentarily obscures the view. The scene then shifts through the central retail area where the lighting begins to fade, moving past browsing shoppers and display pedestals toward the back of the boutique. Finally, the camera enters a dark, narrow hallway where the illumination drops significantly, leaving only neon floor strips and a backlit shoe display wall to light the path.
